title: Updating Mirrored Status Columns
excerpt:

posts.author: thedigitaledit (Ami Shah)
posts.cookedHtml:
There seems to be a limitation where you cannot use a mirrored column in an automation if that connected board is connected to multiple other boards. Does anyone know of a work around to this?

For example, in a real estate workspace I have a Leads Board, Properties Board, Tours Board, and Task Boards. My Leads Board is connected to all three other boards. Because of this, I cannot use the automation to sync statuses. But I would love to figure out a way for my Tour Status, Lead Status, Property Status and Task Status all together

image1259×460 31 KB

posts.author: rodneyz (Rodney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @thedigitaledit , how are you? and welcome to the community. I’ve published an article with a guide to how to set it up so you can get that automation working. Here is it

Same Item Multiple Boards

How to use mirrored status columns in automations

Use case from a monday user
